arguments.title: AES Decryption Engine
arguments.description: Decrypts an AES-256-CBC encrypted text using the corresponding key.

mcp.name: decrypt_aes
mcp.title: Decrypt Text with AES
mcp.description: Tool to decrypt a given text that was encrypted using AES 256 CBC. Needs a 'clave' (password) and 'texto' (the encrypted message in format 'iv:encryptedBase64'). Returns the decrypted plaintext.

clave.description: The secret password or key used to decrypt.

texto.description: The encrypted message generated by the encrypt_aes tool.
